headline: Airline Stocks Rally After Dismal Two Weeks When Jet Fuel Prices Soared
summary: On Monday, American Airlines, Delta, and several Latin American carriers all had notable stock market gains.

headline: UBS cuts price targets on airline stocks amid ’significant uncertainty’
summary: Investing.com -- UBS has lowered estimates and price targets across its U.S. airline coverage, warning of “significant uncertainty” surrounding fuel costs and the sector’s 2026 outlook.

headline: Airline CEOs Urge Congress to End Shutdown as 171 Million Travelers Expected
summary: Airline leaders warn unpaid TSA officers and shutdown disruptions could strain US airports during spring break and upcoming major events.

headline: The Market’s Seen This Movie Before. It’s Not an Oscar Winner for Investors.

headline: Southwest Airlines to Present at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has been invited to speak at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference. J.P. Morgan will be webcasting the audio presentation live, and a link to the webcast will be made available via the Investor Relations homepage on the Southwest Airlines website.
